{{Quote|The Republic fleet, led by Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi, encounters resistance as it enters the orbit of the planet Muunilinst. The Republic's attack gunships manage to land on the planet, where they encounter the Droid Army of the Separatists. Advanced Recon Commandos, the elite shock forces of the Republic Army, are deployed on a special mission within the city, but their ship is shot down behind enemy lines.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/2.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Two (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 2'''" is the second episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the second episode in [[Clone Wars: Season One|Season One]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Written and directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 10]], [[2003]].

==Plot summary==
Onboard an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] informs his squad of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]] of their mission: to secure the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] headquarters as soon as possible, in order to quickly end the battle.

Afterwards, Kenobi goes to speak with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who is working on [[Azure Angel|his starfighter]]. Skywalker complains that the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] are unwilling to acknowledge his skills; Kenobi retorts that his skills are never in question, but his willingness to follow orders and recognize his place are. Kenobi offers a terse "[[May the Force be with you/Legends|May the Force be with you]]," before leaving Skywalker to his ship.

As the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] fleet drops out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] above [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], it immediately comes under attack from orbiting defense platforms and squadrons of [[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian starfighters]]. The [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]] has begun.

Skywalker leads the [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19]] fighters against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], while thousands of [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|gunships]] ferry Kenobi and his soldiers down to the surface. Kenobi gives the order for the [[Muunilinst 10 LAAT|ARC gunship]] to veer off towards the Banking Clan headquarters. Before it can reach there, however, it is shot down by a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droid]]. This strands the ARC troopers in an unfamiliar area of the city of [[Harnaidan|Harnaidan.]]

==Release and reception==
The episode was released on DVD on [[March 22]], [[2005]]. It was presented is an edited compilation with the other chapters that make up Volume I.
